creator: matusita@ics.es.osaka-u.ac.jp
text:
asami> Um, that's not what I meant.  Please take a "diff -ru skk.old skk"
asami> where skk.old is the directory for ports-current/japanese/skk (version
asami> 8.6) and skk is your new version 9.6.

Ah.... sorry, sorry, sorry, just my misunderstanding. I added the
patch below.

asami> (And I'm expecting you to check the diff before sending it
asami> over, by the way...there seems to be a lot of changes from 8.6
asami> that I'm not sure about.)

Yes, I've made the patch before, but it is TOO large, so I decided to
put 'whole' ports (it's small).

9.6 uses GNU configure, so building/installing skk becomes quite easy. 

8.6-ports puts rc.d/skkserv.sh (i.e., start skkserv (conversion server
of skk) by default), however, skkserv can be start by skk emacs-lisp
interface (if interface detects there is no skkserv, invokeit), so I
think there is no need to add 'post-install' target (I don't know why
this is putted in current ports).

-- -
Makoto `MAR_kun' MATSUSHITA

diff -ru skk.old/Makefile skk/Makefile
--- skk.old/Makefile	Mon Mar  3 12:25:43 1997
+++ skk/Makefile	Thu Feb 13 14:37:07 1997
@@ -1,38 +1,24 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	skk
-# Version required:	8.6
-# Date created:		10 Aug 1996
-# Whom:			Hidekazu Kuroki <hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp>
+# Version required:	9.6
+# Date created:		13 Feb 1997
+# Whom:			Makoto Matsushita <matusita@jp.freebsd.org>
 #
-# $Id: Makefile,v 1.3 1996/11/11 10:12:51 max Exp $
+# $Id$
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	skk8.6
-PKGNAME=	jp-skk-8.6
+DISTNAME=	skk9.6
+PKGNAME=	jp-skk-9.6
 CATEGORIES=	japanese
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.cs.keio.ac.jp/pub/misc/skk/ \
-		ftp://ftp.tohoku.ac.jp/mirror/skk/8.6/
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://skk.kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp/skk/9.6/ \
+		ftp://steam.stanford.edu/pub/skk/9.6/
 
-MAINTAINER=	hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp
+MAINTAINER=	matusita@jp.freebsd.org
 
-# Don't RUN_DEPENDS on mule because we don't know which version the
-# user would want.  We can't omit the BUILD_DEPENDS because it needs
-# to byte-compile .el files.
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	mule:${PORTSDIR}/editors/mule
 
-NO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/skk-9.6
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-STARTUP_SCRIPT=	${PREFIX}/etc/rc.d/skkserv.sh
-
-post-install:
-	@if [ ! -f ${STARTUP_SCRIPT} ]; then \
-		echo "Installing ${STARTUP_SCRIPT} file."; \
-		echo "#!/bin/sh" > ${STARTUP_SCRIPT}; \
-		echo "if [ -f ${PREFIX}/bin/SKK/skkserv ]; then" >> \
-			${STARTUP_SCRIPT}; \
-		echo "	echo -n ' skkserv'; ${PREFIX}/bin/SKK/skkserv" >> \
-			${STARTUP_SCRIPT}; \
-		echo "fi" >> ${STARTUP_SCRIPT}; \
-		chmod 755 ${STARTUP_SCRIPT}; \
-	fi
+MAKE_FLAGS+=	EMACS=mule
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -ru skk.old/files/md5 skk/files/md5
--- skk.old/files/md5	Mon Mar  3 12:25:47 1997
+++ skk/files/md5	Mon Feb 17 17:33:36 1997
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (skk8.6.tar.gz) = d95b6c9e15e639986b1ec8f470a15df8
+MD5 (skk9.6.tar.gz) = 26bd151234f69caa2e1591aaf551fb1d
diff -ru skk.old/patches/patch-aa skk/patches/patch-aa
--- skk.old/patches/patch-aa	Mon Mar  3 12:25:50 1997
+++ skk/patches/patch-aa	Sun Mar  2 23:26:56 1997
@@ -1,419 +1,151 @@
-diff -arcN ../skk-8.6.org/Makefile ./Makefile
-*** ../skk-8.6.org/Makefile	Wed May 24 17:49:39 1995
---- ./Makefile	Mon Aug 19 07:01:59 1996
+*** Makefile.in.orig	Mon Feb  3 18:21:39 1997
+--- Makefile.in	Sun Mar  2 23:26:25 1997
 ***************
-*** 2,35 ****
-  #	Makefile for SKK
-  ###########################################################################
-  #
-! EMACS= /usr/local/bin/mule
-  #
-! LISPDIR= /usr/local/mule/lisp
-  ELFILES= skk.el skk-tut.el skk-tools.el skk-isearch.el
-  ELCFILES= skk.elc skk-tut.elc skk-tools.elc skk-isearch.elc
-  #
-! JISYODIR= /usr/local/mule/etc
-  JISYO= SKK-JISYO.L
-  #
-! INFODIR= /usr/local/mule/info
-  INFO= skk
-  #
-! ETCDIR= /usr/local/mule/etc
-! SKKFILES= SKK.tut SKK.tut.E \
-! 	SKK-JISYO.S SKK-JISYO.M SKK-JISYO.L SKK-JISYO.JIS2
-  #
-! EXECDIR= /usr/local/mule/etc
-  EXECFILES= emacs-sort
-  #
-  # skkserv will be installed into the following directory
-! SERVERDIR= /usr/local/mule/etc
-  #
-  # Manual DIRECTORY
-! MANDIR= /usr/local/mule/man
-  MANFILES= skk-romkan.tex skk.tex latexinfo.sty tabular.sty skk.ps
-  #
-  # Do you prefer GNU C Compiler ?  I don't.
-! CC= gcc -traditional
-  #CC= cc -O
-  #
-  # for skkserv 
---- 2,56 ----
-  #	Makefile for SKK
-  ###########################################################################
-  #
-! # Change some make rules for FreeBSD,
-! # because don't to use Configure.
-! # Patched by Hidekazu Kuroki(hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp)		1996/8/10
-  #
-! #
-! PREFIX?= /usr/local
-! #
-! LIBDIR= ${PREFIX}/lib
-! #
-! BINDIR= ${PREFIX}/bin
-! #
-! SKKDIR= ${LIBDIR}/skk
-! #
-! EMACS= ${BINDIR}/mule
-! #
-! EMACSDIR= ${LIBDIR}/mule
-! #
-! EMACSVER= 19.28
-! #
-! LISPDIR= ${EMACSDIR}/site-lisp
-  ELFILES= skk.el skk-tut.el skk-tools.el skk-isearch.el
-  ELCFILES= skk.elc skk-tut.elc skk-tools.elc skk-isearch.elc
-  #
-! JISYODIR= ${SKKDIR}/dict
-  JISYO= SKK-JISYO.L
-+ JISYO_ALL= SKK-JISYO.S SKK-JISYO.M SKK-JISYO.L SKK-JISYO.JIS2
-  #
-! INFODIR= ${PREFIX}/info
-  INFO= skk
-  #
-! ETCDIR= ${EMACSDIR}/${EMACSVER}/etc
-! SKKFILES= SKK.tut SKK.tut.E
-  #
-! EXECDIR= ${EMACSDIR}/${EMACSVER}/i386--freebsd
-  EXECFILES= emacs-sort
-  #
-  # skkserv will be installed into the following directory
-! SERVERDIR= ${BINDIR}/SKK
-! #
-! # jisyo-tools will be installed into the following directory
-! TOOLSDIR= ${BINDIR}/SKK
-  #
-  # Manual DIRECTORY
-! MANDIR= ${SKKDIR}
-  MANFILES= skk-romkan.tex skk.tex latexinfo.sty tabular.sty skk.ps
-  #
-  # Do you prefer GNU C Compiler ?  I don't.
-! CC= cc
-! #CC= gcc -traditional
-  #CC= cc -O
-  #
-  # for skkserv 
-***************
-*** 40,76 ****
-  .SUFFIXES: .el .elc $(SUFFIXES)
+*** 19,28 ****
   
-  ###########################################################################
-! all: 
-! 	@echo "You should specify an argument"
-  
-  everything:	public
-  
-! public:		install-skk skkserv-public
-  
-! private:	install-skk skkserv-private
-  
-  install-skk:	$(ELCFILES)
-  	for f in $(SKKFILES) ;\
-  	  do cp $$f $(ETCDIR); chmod 644 $(ETCDIR)/$$f; \
-  	done
-  	cp $(EXECFILES) $(EXECDIR); chmod 755 $(EXECDIR)/$(EXECFILES) ; 
-  	for f in $(ELFILES) $(ELCFILES) ;\
-  	  do cp $$f $(LISPDIR); chmod 644 $(LISPDIR)/$$f; \
-  	done
-  	cp $(JISYO) $(JISYODIR); chmod 644 $(JISYODIR)/$(JISYO)
-  	cp $(INFO) $(INFODIR); chmod 644 $(INFODIR)/$(INFO)
-  	for f in $(MANFILES) ;\
-  	  do cp $$f $(MANDIR); chmod 644 $(MANDIR)/$$f; \
-  	done
-  
-  skkserv-public:
-  	(cd skkserv; make install CC=$(CC) SERVERDIR=$(SERVERDIR) \
-  		JISYODIR=$(JISYODIR) JISYO=$(JISYO) NIS=$(NIS) )
-  
-  skkserv-private:
-  	(cd skkserv; make private-install CC=$(CC) SERVERDIR=$(SERVERDIR) \
-  		JISYODIR=$(JISYODIR) JISYO=$(JISYO) NIS=$(NIS) )
-  
-  .el.elc:
-  	$(EMACS) -batch -f batch-byte-compile $?
-  
---- 61,132 ----
-  .SUFFIXES: .el .elc $(SUFFIXES)
-  
-  ###########################################################################
-! 
-! install:	public-install
-! #	dummy
-! 
-! all: 		public
-! #	@echo "You should specify an argument"
-  
-  everything:	public
-  
-! public:		$(ELCFILES) skkserv-public skk-jisyo-tools
-  
-! public-install:	install-skk skkserv-public-install skk-jisyo-tools-install
-! 
-! private:	$(ELCFILES) skkserv-private skk-jisyo-tools
-! 
-! private-install:	install-skk skkserv-private-install skk-jisyo-tools-install
-  
-  install-skk:	$(ELCFILES)
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${LIBDIR} ]; then mkdir ${LIBDIR}; fi
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${EMACSDIR} ]; then mkdir ${EMACSDIR}; fi
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${EMACSDIR}/${EMACSVER} ]; then mkdir ${EMACSDIR}/${EMACSVER}; fi
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${ETCDIR} ]; then mkdir ${ETCDIR}; fi
-  	for f in $(SKKFILES) ;\
-  	  do cp $$f $(ETCDIR); chmod 644 $(ETCDIR)/$$f; \
-  	done
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${EXECDIR} ]; then mkdir ${EXECDIR}; fi
-  	cp $(EXECFILES) $(EXECDIR); chmod 755 $(EXECDIR)/$(EXECFILES) ; 
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${LISPDIR} ]; then mkdir ${LISPDIR}; fi
-  	for f in $(ELFILES) $(ELCFILES) ;\
-  	  do cp $$f $(LISPDIR); chmod 644 $(LISPDIR)/$$f; \
-  	done
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${SKKDIR} ]; then mkdir ${SKKDIR}; fi
-+ 	for f in $(JISYO_ALL) ;\
-+ 	  do cp $$f $(SKKDIR); chmod 644 $(SKKDIR)/$$f; \
-+ 	done
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${JISYODIR} ]; then mkdir ${JISYODIR}; fi
-  	cp $(JISYO) $(JISYODIR); chmod 644 $(JISYODIR)/$(JISYO)
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${INFODIR} ]; then mkdir ${INFODIR}; fi
-  	cp $(INFO) $(INFODIR); chmod 644 $(INFODIR)/$(INFO)
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${MANDIR} ]; then mkdir ${MANDIR}; fi
-  	for f in $(MANFILES) ;\
-  	  do cp $$f $(MANDIR); chmod 644 $(MANDIR)/$$f; \
-  	done
-  
-  skkserv-public:
-+ 	(cd skkserv; make all CC=$(CC) SERVERDIR=$(SERVERDIR) \
-+ 		JISYODIR=$(JISYODIR) JISYO=$(JISYO) NIS=$(NIS) )
-+ 
-+ skkserv-public-install:
-  	(cd skkserv; make install CC=$(CC) SERVERDIR=$(SERVERDIR) \
-  		JISYODIR=$(JISYODIR) JISYO=$(JISYO) NIS=$(NIS) )
-  
-  skkserv-private:
-+ 	(cd skkserv; make private-all CC=$(CC) SERVERDIR=$(SERVERDIR) \
-+ 		JISYODIR=$(JISYODIR) JISYO=$(JISYO) NIS=$(NIS) )
-+ 
-+ skkserv-private-install:
-  	(cd skkserv; make private-install CC=$(CC) SERVERDIR=$(SERVERDIR) \
-  		JISYODIR=$(JISYODIR) JISYO=$(JISYO) NIS=$(NIS) )
-  
-+ skk-jisyo-tools:
-+ 	(cd jisyo-tools; make all CC=$(CC) TOOLSDIR=$(TOOLSDIR))
-+ 
-+ skk-jisyo-tools-install :
-+ 	(cd jisyo-tools; make install CC=$(CC) TOOLSDIR=$(TOOLSDIR))
-+ 
-  .el.elc:
-  	$(EMACS) -batch -f batch-byte-compile $?
+  prefix = @prefix@
+  exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+! bindir = $(exec_prefix)/bin
+! libexecdir = $(exec_prefix)/libexec
+! datadir = $(prefix)/share
+! infodir = $(prefix)/info
   
+  EMACS = @EMACS@
+  TEXI2DVI = texi2dvi
+--- 19,28 ----
+  
+  prefix = @prefix@
+  exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+! bindir = @bindir@
+! libexecdir = @libexecdir@
+! datadir = @datadir@
+! infodir = @infodir@
+  
+  EMACS = @EMACS@
+  TEXI2DVI = texi2dvi
 ***************
-*** 80,89 ****
---- 136,150 ----
-  skk-is.elc:	skk-is.el
-  	$(EMACS) -batch -l skk.el -f batch-byte-compile $?
-  
-+ skk-isearch.el:	skk-is-m.el
-+ 	cp skk-is-m.el skk-isearch.el
-+ 
-  skktools:
-  	@echo "Sorry, I don't know skktools"
-  
-  
-  clean:
-+ 	rm -f *.elc skk-isearch.el
-  	(cd skkserv; make clean)
-+ 	(cd jisyo-tools; make clean)
-  ###########################################################################
-diff -arcN ../skk-8.6.org/jisyo-tools/Makefile ./jisyo-tools/Makefile
-*** ../skk-8.6.org/jisyo-tools/Makefile	Mon Jan 30 20:04:44 1995
---- ./jisyo-tools/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 07:05:52 1996
-***************
-*** 17,22 ****
---- 17,29 ----
-  # along with SKK; see the file COPYING.  If not, write to
-  # the Free Software Foundation, 675 Mass Ave, Cambridge, MA 02139, USA.  */
-  
-+ # 
-+ # Change some make rules for FreeBSD,
-+ # because don't to use Configure.
-+ # Add install and clean target.
-+ # Patched by Hidekazu Kuroki(hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp)		1996/8/10
-+ #
-+ 
-  CC=cc
-  CFLAGS=-O -DTMPDIR=\"/tmp\"
+*** 37,43 ****
+  
+  MDEFINES = CC='$(CC)' CFLAGS='$(CFLAGS)' LDFLAGS='$(LDFLAGS)' \
+  	EMACS='$(EMACS)' JISYO='$(JISYO)' JISYODIR='$(JISYODIR)' \
+! 	ELISPDIR='$(ELISPDIR)' TEXI2DVI='$(TEXI2DVI)'
   
+  all: config.h
+  	for subdir in $(SUBDIRS); do \

+  MDEFINES = CC='$(CC)' CFLAGS='$(CFLAGS)' LDFLAGS='$(LDFLAGS)' \
+  	EMACS='$(EMACS)' JISYO='$(JISYO)' JISYODIR='$(JISYODIR)' \
+! 	ELISPDIR='$(ELISPDIR)' SKKDIR='$(SKKDIR)' TEXI2DVI='$(TEXI2DVI)'
+  
+  all: config.h
+  	for subdir in $(SUBDIRS); do \
+*** doc/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Jan 28 15:54:39 1997
+--- doc/Makefile.in	Sun Mar  2 23:26:26 1997
 ***************
-*** 24,30 ****
-  #CC=gcc
-  #CFLAGS=-O2 -g -Wall -DTMPDIR=\"/tmp\"

-! ALL: skkjisyo-expr skkjisyo-sort skkjisyo-entries

-  	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ skkjisyo-expr.c
---- 31,45 ----
-  #CC=gcc
-  #CFLAGS=-O2 -g -Wall -DTMPDIR=\"/tmp\"
-  
-! #TOOLSDIR=
-! 
-! all: skkjisyo-expr skkjisyo-sort skkjisyo-entries
-! 
-! install: skkjisyo-expr skkjisyo-sort skkjisyo-entries
-! 	if [ ! -d ${TOOLSDIR} ]; then mkdir ${TOOLSDIR}; fi
-! 	for f in $? ;\
-! 	  do cp $$f $(TOOLSDIR); chmod 755 $(TOOLSDIR)/$$f; \
-! 	done
+*** 4,16 ****
+  top_srcdir = @top_srcdir@
+  VPATH = @srcdir@
+  
+! INFOOBJ = skk.info-1 skk.info-2 skk.info-3 skk.info-4 skk.info-5 skk.info-6
+  
+  INSTALL = @INSTALL@
+  INSTALL_DATA = @INSTALL_DATA@
   
-  skkjisyo-expr: skkjisyo-expr.c
-  	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ skkjisyo-expr.c
+  prefix = @prefix@
+! infodir = $(prefix)/info
+  
+  TEXI2DVI = texi2dvi
+

+  top_srcdir = @top_srcdir@
+  VPATH = @srcdir@
+  
+! INFOOBJ = skk.info skk.info-1 skk.info-2 skk.info-3 skk.info-4 skk.info-5 skk.info-6
+  
+  INSTALL = @INSTALL@
+  INSTALL_DATA = @INSTALL_DATA@
+  
+  prefix = @prefix@
+! infodir = @infodir@
+  
+  TEXI2DVI = texi2dvi
+  
+*** etc/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Jan 28 15:51:55 1997

 ***************
-*** 34,36 ****
---- 49,54 ----

+! datadir = $(prefix)/share

+  
+  TUTOBJ = SKK.tut SKK.tut.E
+--- 8,14 ----
+  INSTALL_DATA = @INSTALL_DATA@
   
-  skkjisyo-entries: skkjisyo-entries.c
-  	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o $@ skkjisyo-entries.c
-+ 
-+ clean:
-+ 	rm -f skkjisyo-expr skkjisyo-sort skkjisyo-entries
-diff -arcN ../skk-8.6.org/skk-tut.el ./skk-tut.el
-*** ../skk-8.6.org/skk-tut.el	Thu May 25 12:47:03 1995
---- ./skk-tut.el	Mon Aug 12 18:18:30 1996

+*** jisyo-tools/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Feb  7 15:22:16 1997
+--- jisyo-tools/Makefile.in	Sun Mar  2 23:26:26 1997
 ***************
-*** 36,42 ****
+*** 37,43 ****
+  
+  prefix = @prefix@
+  exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+! bindir = $(exec_prefix)/bin
+  
+  DEFS = -I$(srcdir) -I$(top_srcdir) $(CFLAGS)

+--- 37,43 ----
+  
+  prefix = @prefix@
+  exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+! bindir = @bindir@
   
-  ;; Introduced by W. Matsui (matsui@atr-rd.atr.co.jp), 1991.8.14.
-  ;; modified by Masahiko Sato, 1992.5.30.

-    "Full path name of the SKK tutorial file.")

-    "This will be used as the argument of load.  You can specify the locally
---- 36,52 ----
-  
-  ;; Introduced by W. Matsui (matsui@atr-rd.atr.co.jp), 1991.8.14.
-  ;; modified by Masahiko Sato, 1992.5.30.
-! ;;
-! ;; Change exec-directory -> data-directory,
-! ;; because cannot copt tutrial file.

-! ;;(defvar skk-tut-file (concat exec-directory "SKK.tut")
-! ;;  "Full path name of the SKK tutorial file.")

-!   "Full path name of the English SKK tutorial file.")

-    "Full path name of the SKK tutorial file.")
-  (defvar skk-file "skk"
-    "This will be used as the argument of load.  You can specify the locally
-diff -arcN ../skk-8.6.org/skkserv/Makefile ./skkserv/Makefile
-*** ../skk-8.6.org/skkserv/Makefile	Tue Jun  7 00:13:43 1994
---- ./skkserv/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 07:04:13 1996
+  DEFS = -I$(srcdir) -I$(top_srcdir) $(CFLAGS)
+  
+*** lisp/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Jan 28 16:03:47 1997
+--- lisp/Makefile.in	Sun Mar  2 23:26:26 1997
 ***************
-*** 2,7 ****
---- 2,13 ----
-  #	Makefile for SKK Server Version 3.x
-  ###########################################################################
-  
-+ #
-+ # Change some make rules for FreeBSD,
-+ # because don't to use Configure.
-+ # Patched by Hidekazu Kuroki(hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp)		1996/8/10

+! datadir = $(prefix)/share
+  
+  EMACS = @EMACS@
+  ELISPDIR = $(datadir)/emacs/site-lisp

+

+! datadir = @datadir@
+  
+  EMACS = @EMACS@
+  ELISPDIR = $(datadir)/emacs/site-lisp
+*** skkserv/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Feb  7 11:05:23 1997
+--- skkserv/Makefile.in	Sun Mar  2 23:26:26 1997
 ***************
-*** 19,34 ****
-  # You can try HP_UX option if your system is System V UNIX.

-  # Do you prefer GNU C Compiler ?  Yes, I do.
-! CC = gcc -traditional -O
-! #CC = cc -O

-  # TARGET DIRECTORY
-  # skkserv will be installed into the following directory
-! SERVERDIR = /usr/local/mule/etc
-  ###########################################################################

-! JISYO = SKK-JISYO.L
-! JISYODIR = /usr/local/mule/etc
-  ###########################################################################
-  # if you cannot become a superuser and install skkserv privately, 
-  # define PRIVATE
---- 25,40 ----
-  # You can try HP_UX option if your system is System V UNIX.
-  ###########################################################################
-  # Do you prefer GNU C Compiler ?  Yes, I do.
-! #CC = gcc -traditional -O
-! CC = cc -O
-  ###########################################################################
-  # TARGET DIRECTORY
-  # skkserv will be installed into the following directory
-! #SERVERDIR = /usr/local/mule/etc
-  ###########################################################################
+*** 19,26 ****
+  
+  prefix = @prefix@
+  exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+! libexecdir = $(exec_prefix)/libexec
+! datadir = $(prefix)/share
+  
   # SKK JISYO which skkserv uses
-! #JISYO = SKK-JISYO.L
-! #JISYODIR = /usr/local/mule/etc
-  ###########################################################################
-  # if you cannot become a superuser and install skkserv privately, 
-  # define PRIVATE
-***************
-*** 46,51 ****
---- 52,59 ----
-  ###########################################################################
-  all: 	skkserv
-  
-+ private-all:	private
-+ 
-  skkserv: skkserv.h skkserv.c
-  	$(CC) $(COMPAT) $(PRIVATE) \
-  		-DDEFAULT_JISYO=\"$(JISYODIR)/$(JISYO)\" \
-***************
-*** 57,65 ****
-  		-o private skkserv.c
+  JISYO = SKK-JISYO.L
+--- 19,26 ----
   
-  install:	skkserv
-  	cp skkserv $(SERVERDIR); chmod 755 $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv
-! 	sh add-services $(NIS)
-! 	sh add-rc.local $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv
-  
-  private-install:	private
-  	cp private $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv; chmod 755 $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv
---- 65,74 ----
-  		-o private skkserv.c
-  
-  install:	skkserv
-+ 	if [ ! -d ${SERVERDIR} ]; then mkdir ${SERVERDIR}; fi
-  	cp skkserv $(SERVERDIR); chmod 755 $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv
-! #	sh add-services $(NIS)
-! #	sh add-rc.local $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv
-  
-  private-install:	private
-  	cp private $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv; chmod 755 $(SERVERDIR)/skkserv
-diff -arcN ../skk-8.6.org/skkserv/skkserv.c ./skkserv/skkserv.c
-*** ../skk-8.6.org/skkserv/skkserv.c	Fri Jun 17 11:53:58 1994
---- ./skkserv/skkserv.c	Mon Aug 19 07:32:05 1996
-***************
-*** 480,486 ****
+  prefix = @prefix@
+  exec_prefix = @exec_prefix@
+! libexecdir = @libexecdir@
+! datadir = @datadir@
   
-      if (FD_ISSET(initsock, &readfds)) {
-        len = sizeof(from);
-!       if ((clientsock[nclients ++] = accept(initsock, &from, &len)) < 0) {
-  	err("accept error; something wrong happened with the socket");
-        }
-        if (nclients >= MAXDTAB - 3 - debug * 2) {
---- 480,491 ----
-  
-      if (FD_ISSET(initsock, &readfds)) {
-        len = sizeof(from);
-! /*
-!  * Remove warning.
-!  * Patched by Hidekazu Kuroki(hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp)		1996/8/10
-!  */
-! /*    if ((clientsock[nclients ++] = accept(initsock, &from, &len)) < 0) { */
-!       if ((clientsock[nclients ++] = accept(initsock, (struct sockaddr *)&from, &len)) < 0) {
-  	err("accept error; something wrong happened with the socket");
-        }
-        if (nclients >= MAXDTAB - 3 - debug * 2) {
+  # SKK JISYO which skkserv uses
+  JISYO = SKK-JISYO.L
diff -ru skk.old/pkg/COMMENT skk/pkg/COMMENT
--- skk.old/pkg/COMMENT	Mon Mar  3 12:25:55 1997
+++ skk/pkg/COMMENT	Thu Feb 13 14:37:07 1997
@@ -1 +1 @@
-A emacs-lisp Japanese input method for mule.
+Simple Kana Kanji Convertor: a Japanese-input software running on Nemacs or Mule.
diff -ru skk.old/pkg/DESCR skk/pkg/DESCR
--- skk.old/pkg/DESCR	Mon Mar  3 12:25:55 1997
+++ skk/pkg/DESCR	Thu Feb 13 12:23:40 1997
@@ -1,13 +1,11 @@
-This is Skk-8.6, a Japanese input method based emacs-lisp for mule.
-When you use this, you can choose to use skkserv or not.
-If you use skkserv, you must add a following entry into
-/etc/services file or NIS/YP services map.
+SKK (Simple Kana Kanji Convertor) is a very fast and efficient Japanese input
+method system, written in emacs-lisp. SKK runs on NEmacs (Japanized Emacs18),
+Mule (MULtilingual Emacs), and Demacs (DOS version of Emacs18/NEmacs).
 
-skkserv		1178/tcp
+Check <URL:http://skk.kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp/skk/> also, Home Page of SKK.
 
-This also include some patches for FreeBSD or others.
-(Fix a bug of emacs-lisp and change make rule.)
-If there are any problem in this patches, please know me via E-mail.
+When you select 'skkserv' as a conversion server, add
 
-Hidekazu Kuroki
-(hidekazu@cs.titech.ac.jp)
+	skkserv		1178/tcp
+
+to your /etc/services (or 'services' NIS database).
